factions.name: The Concordium
factions.ideology: Progress Through Unity. Power Through Harmony.
factions.background: The original faction founded by the first explorers, scientists, and engineers to arrive on Xylos. They repaired the Aethel Siphon and built the capital city of Nexus. Now they are the old guard, a sprawling bureaucracy trying to uphold their founding ideals in a divided world.
goals: Reunite factions through diplomacy or force
strengths: Control of Nexus and the Aethel Cradle
weaknesses: Eroding authority due to rival factions

currency.name: Aethel-Mark Credit
currency.description: A digital and physical currency backed by regulated control over the Aethel Siphon, representing stability and order.

factions.name: The Arcanum Seekers
factions.ideology: Knowledge is the only true power.
factions.background: A splinter group of scientific elites from the Concordium who believe knowledge must be pursued without limits.
goals: Advance sentient evolution regardless of risk

currency.name: Quanta
currency.description: A purely digital unit representing processed data or refined energy.

factions.name: The Iron Hegemony
factions.ideology: Order Through Strength. Peace Through Power.
factions.background: Formed from the military-industrial core of the Concordium, believing peace requires absolute control.

currency.name: Ingot
currency.description: Metal-based currency tied directly to industrial output.

factions.name: The Meridian Cartel
factions.ideology: Everything has a price. Influence is the true currency.
factions.background: Former diplomats and merchants who realized economic control outweighs military power.

currency.name: Aurum Cipher
currency.description: Encrypted digital currency for untraceable high-value transactions.

factions.name: OmniCorp
factions.ideology: Progress is profit. The future is proprietary.
factions.background: An off-world mega-corporation exploiting Xylos as a resource asset.

currency.name: OmniCred
currency.description: Closed-system digital currency used exclusively within OmniCorp.

factions.name: The Children of the Shard
factions.ideology: The Shard is sacred. The Aethel is its voice.
factions.background: A religious cult viewing the Aethel Shard as divine and technology as heresy.

currency.name: Aethel-Tithes
currency.description: Sacred offerings and consecrated Aethel fragments used in barter.

factions.name: The Starforged Legion
factions.ideology: A home is earned by blood and honor.
factions.background: A nomadic warrior culture seeking a permanent home after their system was destroyed.

currency.name: Legion Scrip
currency.description: Closed-loop resource-backed currency ensuring equitable distribution.
